title: cajanus reticulatus var. maritimus
intro: Cajanus reticulatus var. maritimus, also known as Seashore Calotropis or Beach Calotropis, is a type of plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family and is native to tropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and wounds. Herbal preparations of Cajanus reticulatus var. maritimus include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
